---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

One sentence describing the feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits and how?

## Proposed solution

How should ZEA implement this? Be as specific as you can — pseudocode, CLI flags, output format changes are all helpful.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider, and why did you prefer this approach?

## Pipeline stage affected

Which stage of the ZEA pipeline does this touch?

- [ ] Repository Discovery
- [ ] Structural Analysis
- [ ] Architecture Inference
- [ ] Domain Intelligence
- [ ] Infrastructure Intelligence
- [ ] AKG Schema / Builder
- [ ] Visualization
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional context

Links to prior art, similar tools, relevant research, or related issues.
